comments.comment: The scope section does not address data retention policy. Specify how long uploaded documents and generated specs are stored, and whether users can delete them.

The architecture does not specify how the application handles authentication and authorisation. Even if auth is deferred, a placeholder for the auth boundary should be noted to avoid future breaking changes.
The acceptance criteria do not specify behaviour when extraction fails mid-way (e.g., LLM timeout). Add a criterion for error state and retry capability.

The ExtractedRequirement model's document_id is nullable (ON DELETE SET NULL), but the UI shows source references. Consider what happens to the source reference tooltip when the source document is deleted.
The auto-save debounce is 500 ms but there is no conflict resolution strategy if two browser tabs have the same spec open. Clarify this is single-session only for MVP.
